title: 2015 California State Qualifier, South Lake Tahoe, Third-Place Tin
collection: Harry’s Room — The Harry Leary Collection
description: A 2015 California State Championship Qualifier award from South Lake Tahoe BMX, identified by the collection as Harry Leary’s third-place tin.
provenance_summary: Presented as part of the Harry Leary Collection; acquisition detail was not supplied in this source package.
qualifications: The event, year and South Lake Tahoe BMX wording are visible on the object.
The third-place result and Harry Leary attribution are preserved from the supplied collection description.
